CustomField.description: Manual "Times (x) Years of Service" override for Scenario 2, entered on the FERS workbook pages. NOT maintained by the YOS Flow, so a manual what-if entry survives and is shared across all workbook pages. When blank, the pages fall back to the Flow-computed Scenario2_YOS__c.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Manual Years of Service override for Scenario 2. Leave blank to use the auto-calculated value.
CustomField.label: Scenario 2 YOS (Manual Override)
